text.message: i assumed you get the road, but it doesn't make sense to build elsewhere
I don't produce wood, so I think it would be super slow
and i don't think people would trade me much wood here
though in reality red takes it and nothing any of us can do
why trade red instead of oj? red is def ahead
He could have token ore port
Don't just hand it to red as revenge...
dudes with a city and 2 down devs
why not 8 ore? it hurts oj even more, but also blocks red?
because he wants to let red catch up
